text.title: Puppeteer Page Interaction (Selectors, Clicks, Forms) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for puppeteer-page-interaction.

conclusion.verdict: enable request interception + block analytics/ads; speeds 3-5x
waitForSelector({ visible: true }) on the post-load anchor before the next click

text.example: interaction=form_submit → typeByTestId('email') + typeByTestId('card-number') + clickByTestId('submit') wrapped in Promise.all with waitForResponse('/api/checkout'). Rule: structured-form-fills.
